overview: Tijuana Shop AE is a secure local marketplace for Tijuana, Mexico, where residents and small businesses can buy and sell new or used products. Features real-time chat, Stripe payments, seller analytics, and geolocation map.
features: Stripe direct checkout payments in MXN
Seller analytics dashboard with revenue charts
Interactive Leaflet map with Tijuana colony filters
Product listings with zones and categories
Admin panel with KPI dashboard and moderation
